debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
x : C
⊢ ⨆ p ∈ D, p x = ⊤

proof:
by
  simpa [iSup_subtype'] using congrArg (fun p : PersistenceSubmodule M => p x) D.sSup_eq_top
